% Auto-generated source-truth intake stub for ID11379.
\tzpentry{ID11379}{Closed S3 FLRW Metric}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The closed hyperspherical spatial metric uses angular coordinate chi on S3 with scale radius a(t).
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
ds^{2}=-c^{2}dt^{2}+a(t)^{2}\left[d\chi^{2}+\sin^{2}\chi(d\theta^{2}+\sin^{2}\theta d\phi^{2})\right]
\paragraph{Registry Metadata.}
UUID: \texttt{1a39baa9-e659-54de-829b-7cd78f9d4d7b}. PiID: \texttt{PiID-11379-portal-breathing}. LOC: \texttt{QC - Physics}. arXiv: \texttt{physics.gen-ph}.
